title: Photoamplifier
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Photoamplifiers''' were used to amplify an image of a particular object to begin out contrast or detail. The ''[[Glorious]]'' was fitted with photoamplifiers, which were used to image the [[Teljkon Vagabond]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]''
